heading: Work Experience
summary: Hands-on experience delivering features, improving developer workflows, and collaborating with cross-functional teams.

roles.title: Software Engineering Intern
highlights: Built reusable Flask and Jinja components for internal tools.
Automated weekly reporting workflows and reduced manual update time.
Collaborated with product and QA to ship production bug fixes.

roles.title: Student Developer
highlights: Maintains a student portfolio platform with peer contributors.
Improved onboarding docs and code review standards.
Led sprint demos and coordinated feature handoffs.
